body:
Hello,
I just noticed that there are 3 bacteria have this term, which is being given by PANTHER;
GO:0070478 nuclear-transcribed mRNA catabolic process, 3'-5' exonucleolytic nonsense-mediated decay
As bacteria do not have nuclei, nor NMD, this term makes no sense. 

Can you add the following please? Any other terms related to non-mediated RNA decay should also have this constraint.
never in taxon: 2

Thanks, Andrea

comments.body:
Added in the 'only_in_taxon' file: 

GO:0141065	maternal mRNA clearance	NCBITaxon:2759	Eukaryota	
GO:0000958	mitochondrial mRNA catabolic process	NCBITaxon:2759	Eukaryota	
GO:0000956	nuclear-transcribed	mRNA catabolic process	NCBITaxon:2759	Eukaryota

title: Taxon constraint: please add for GO:0070478 and similar terms
